next_steps: Perform lumbar puncture for CSF analysis including cytology, flow cytometry, EBV PCR, and oligoclonal bands
Obtain specialized neuropathology consultation with immunohistochemistry (e.g., CD20, CD3, EBER-ISH, GFAP, SV40)
Continue dexamethasone to manage significant perilesional edema and mass effect
Perform whole-body PET/CT or repeat imaging of chest/abdomen/pelvis to rule out systemic occult malignancy
Review immunosuppression history in the context of opportunistic infection risk (PML vs lymphoma)
Monitor neurological status closely for signs of herniation given the rapid progression and mass effect
